name: No Crust Ham Chili Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Blend the egg mixture at high speed for a count of 10 seconds.
3. Pour the blended mixture over the ingredients in a pie plate.
4. Bake at 400°F for 45-50 minutes, or until the pie is golden brown.
5. Let set for 10-15 minutes before serving.
VARIATIONS: You may combine any cooked meat, vegetables together, such as chicken and broccoli with cheese, hamburger and mushrooms with tomatoes and cheese, or bacon and green peppers with onion and cheese. Any combination works well. Enjoy!
